name: Basil Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Sweet butter; cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, place the 1 tablespoon of butter and heat it on medium until it has melted.
2. Add the shallots and garlic. Sauté them for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the shallots are tender.
3. Add the Chablis, clam juice, and white wine vinegar. Cook the ingredients for 15 to 20 minutes, or until it is reduced to 1/4 cup.
4. Add the heavy cream and lemon juice. Reduce the heat to low and simmer the ingredients for 1 to 2 minutes, or until the liquid starts to thicken.
5. Raise the heat to medium. While whisking constantly, add the pieces of butter one at a time.
6. Strain the sauce into a blender.
7. Add the basil leaves. Puree the sauce and season it with the salt. If needed, add some water to thin the sauce.
